raw_consumer_statement:
Identity Theft Case ( FTC Report # XXXX ) I am reporting Citibank ( Account ending in XXXX ) for a failed fraud investigation. 
XXXX Account Takeover : Although I opened this account and used it in the past, it had been dormant for a long period after I paid off the balance. This was a clear " Account Takeover '' fraud. 
XXXX Negligent Monitoring : Despite the account being inactive for a long time, Citibank failed to flag the sudden, high-volume transactions that began in the XXXX and XXXX moved to XXXX, XXXX. This was completely inconsistent with my historical spending patterns. 
XXXX Regulatory Violation : Upon my report, Citi attempted an unauthorized {$8000.00} withdrawal from my external XXXX account without my consent. 
4 Bad Faith Re-reporting : After credit bureaus investigated and removed this record in XX/XX/year>, Citi maliciously re-reported the {$14000.00} debt on XX/XX/year>, crashing my score from XXXX to XXXX. 
I am attached the XX/XX/XXXX letter from Citi where they ignore these facts. Their investigation is fundamentally flawed.
